theorem erdosK2_of_explicitDicksonAP12PrimeTupleSupply (hSupply : ExplicitDicksonAP12PrimeTupleSupplyK2) : erdosFixed 2
At first power, subtracting the fixed block shift leaves a multiple of the square prime modulus.
The explicit final residual interface is logically equivalent to the conjunction of the updated odd-tail and large-smoothness hypotheses.
The exact C2 residual is a universal no-surviving reduced-divisor split theorem; beyond that internal kernel, T4, full T6 and T7, the global kernel, and all later rungs remain unclaimed.
Conditional reduction of the r=5 case: if every balanced coloring of K_26 has extension demand exceeding 25 at some vertex, the Erdos-Gyarfas conjecture holds for r=5.
The remaining mathematical content for the pinned Erdős 686 refutation is exactly OddThueTail1000Hypothesis and LargeKSmoothHypothesis; equivalently, it is FinalResidual686Hypothesis.
For Sidon sets A with |A| ~ N^{1/2}, the sumset A+A is equidistributed over residue classes mod m: each class holds ~1/m of A+A.

At d equal to twice the slack minus two, fully nonbridge corridor geometry, the rooted cut condition, injective simple demand pairs, legality, and same-color endpoints imply the exact RL internal-cost budget across all five canonical two-defect shapes.

The exact remaining Erdős 730 gate is the exhaustive common-multiplicity event cover (23), followed by an explicit delta > 0 proving uniformly for X >= 2^57 that FirstPowerFar(X)/X + ShortTop(X)/X <= 1779/2500 - delta; neither step is proved at the pinned commit.

Coprime-refined existence-level C2 bridge. The extra coprimality condition is automatic from the split product identity, but recording it here matches the exact reduced-divisor obstruction used in the C2 analysis.

ExplicitDicksonAP12PrimeTupleSupplyK2 is the still-open assertion that for every U there is u >= U for which 48(12u)+29, 76(12u)+65, 38(12u)+23, and 48(12u)+41 are all prime; even this supplies only k=2, so the other fixed k >= 2 cases remain.

After the d = 2s - 2 closure, the one-stub all-nonbridge RL residual has 5 <= s and d <= 2s - 3; the multi-stub pair inequality and the final connected or 2-connected core remain separate obligations.
